shortAnswer: Thyroglobulin is a storage protein produced exclusively in the thyroid. The value is mainly used for follow-up monitoring after surgical removal of the thyroid for thyroid cancer, as rising values can indicate a recurrence.
metaDescription: Thyroglobulin elevated? Meaning for thyroid follow-up care explained simply.
causesElevated: After thyroid surgery: possible sign of recurrence
doctorQuestions: What does this value mean for my follow-up after thyroid surgery?
Should my Anti-Tg antibodies also be considered?
